mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bc_bazi_record (user_id, user_name,open_id, name, gender, birth_year, birth_month, birth_day, birth_hour, birth_minute, pan_result, yun_result, ip, is_free, create_time, pan_vo, yun_vo) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{openId},#{name}, #{gender}, #{birthYear}, #{birthMonth}, #{birthDay}, #{birthHour}, #{birthMinute}, #{panResult}, #{yunResult}, #{ip}, #{isFree}, NOW(), #{panVo}, #{yunVo})
